name: Ring Toss Precision
description: Drag your finger to aim and release the ring toward the target post. Score points for accuracy.

name: Moving Target
description: Hit a target that moves horizontally across the screen. Timing is everything.

name: Reaction Ring
description: Tap the glowing ring before it disappears. Test your reaction speed.

name: Multi Target Combo
description: Hit a sequence of numbered targets in the correct order as fast as possible.

name: Balance Ring
description: Keep the ring centered on the balance point by tilting your device or dragging.

name: Ring Rush
description: Collect as many rings as possible falling from the top of the screen in 30 seconds.

name: Speed Rings
description: Tap rings as they appear on screen as quickly as possible. Beat the clock.
